description: Lap 1 writes a corrected output.json: adds the missing 'slug' field with a valid URL-safe value, and converts 'tags' from the invalid bare string 'ai-reliability' into a one-item array ['ai-reliability']. JsonSchemaGate validates cleanly on lap 1. Demonstrates the canonical loop reaching DONE with zero API keys.

interactions.agent_output: Read schema.json: title/date/slug/tags are all required, additionalProperties is false, slug must match ^[a-z0-9-]+$, tags must be a non-empty array of strings. Read output.json: slug is missing entirely and tags is the bare string 'ai-reliability' instead of an array. Adding a valid slug and wrapping tags in an array.
interactions.notes: The fix — output.json now validates against schema.json. bl run reaches DONE on lap 1, keyless.

interactions.agent_output: Fix already applied; no further changes needed.
interactions.notes: Fallback for any lap beyond 1 — should not be reached in the happy path.
